title: Job Opening Category Manager at Zebronics South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at Zebronics South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Zebronics South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Jabalpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Zebronics South Asia Partners:
Zebronics South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zebronics South Asia Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
